title: Optimal Code Generation
scenario: Design a prompt that can generate optimal code for a specific problem, taking into account performance, readability, and maintainability. The prompt should be able to handle varying levels of complexity and provide clear explanations for each code optimization.
constraints: Must use a specific set of optimization techniques (e.g., caching, memoization, parallelization)

evaluationCriteria.description: How effective is the generated code in optimizing the given problem?
How clear and concise is the generated code in explaining each optimization?
How reusable is the generated prompt in handling different optimization problems?
